arts.ttl: Steve McManaman makes bold Liverpool title prediction - 'Of course they will'
arts.sum: Liverpool have opened up a five point lead at the Premier League summit as a result of their impressive start to the season under Arne Slot - and they've been backed to stay there

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool have 20-year-old Bundesliga prodigy on their radar
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt midfielder Hugo Larsson is a player in demand and multiple Premier League clubs are keeping tabs on him. According to Florian Plettenberg, Arsenal, Liverpool and Tottenham Hotspur have the player on their radar and they will face competition from top Bundesliga clubs as well. The 20-year-old midfielder is regarded as one of the […] The post Arsenal and Liverpool have 20-year-old Bundesliga prodigy on their radar appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Impressive': Michael Owen shares what he absolutely loves about Arne Slot as Liverpool win again
arts.sum: Liverpool roared into the international break with a big win over Aston Villa as goals from Darwin Nunez and Mo Salah sealed a huge three...

arts.ttl: Unai Emery confirms another Aston Villa injury concern on top of Jacob Ramsey update
arts.sum: Unai Emery confirmed Jacob Ramsey suffered a hamstring injury in Aston Villa's defeat against Liverpool, while Boubacar Kamara felt something late on. Ramsey was replaced just before half-time by John McGinn after suffering his hamstring injury, while Lucas Digne has also picked up an issue but was able to continue deep into the second period.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak will earn superstar status at Liverpool as Middlesbrough pal talks up Scotland prospect
arts.sum: Boro striker Tommy Conway is tipping winger Doak to go all the way at Anfield when he gets back to Merseyside

arts.ttl: Arne Slot offers Alisson Becker Liverpool update and sends Man City warning
arts.sum: Alisson Becker remains sidelined for Liverpool but his trusted deputy Caoimhin Kelleher was more proved his worth in the win over Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Reds handed injury scare as Alexis Mac Allister makes title admission
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool moved further clear at the top of the Premier League on Saturday but there was a worrying moment for the Reds during their victory over Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez truth now clear as Liverpool undroppable left with no guarantees
arts.sum: Ian Doyle looks at the key talking points after Liverpool moved five points clear at the Premier League summit with a 2-0 home win over Aston Villa on Saturday evening

arts.ttl: Unai Emery fumes at Aston Villa penalty call and makes honest Liverpool admission
arts.sum: Unai Emery reacts to his Aston Villa side's 2-0 Premier League defeat to Liverpool at Anfield

arts.ttl: Steve McManaman offers Trent Alexander-Arnold advice amid Real Madrid transfer dilemma
arts.sum: Former Liverpool star Steve McManaman left the club for Real Madrid in 1999, and right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold has been linked with an identical move in the summer
